It is designed specifically for high-value photography equipment so that, in the event of damage or malfunction, repair or replacement services are handled expediently, keeping your shooting schedule uninterrupted.

5. Mandatory Insurance Requirements for German Freelancers (Effective by March 31st):
   • Primary Health Coverage Requirement: As a freelancer in Germany, you must secure a primary health insurance plan that provides both physical and mental health coverage.    • Compliance and Continuous Service: These measures are designed not only to comply with legal requirements but also to ensure continuous and uninterrupted service.
